“Hastur Lord” by Marion Zimmer Bradley & Deborah J. Ross

About 1 min reading time
  • 27 May 2010
  • novel,
  • science fiction

review copyright © 2010 by P. Douglas Reeder

There are several excellent Darkover novels, and the series was at one time my favorite. While they have aged better than many SF books of the ’60s and ’70s, they have not always held up under re-reading.

Hastur Lord takes up some of Bradley’s best characters ten years after The Year of the World-Wreckers.

  • Previous: “Timeline” by Michael Crichton
  • Next: “Scratch!” for webOS review
